steps.title: Find where the function equals zero
steps.content:
The x-intercept occurs where the graph crosses the x-axis, which happens when $y = 0$. Setting $f(x) = 0$:
$$7x - 84 = 0$$

steps.title: Solve for x
steps.content:
Add 84 to both sides and divide by 7:
$$7x = 84$$
$$x = 12$$
So the x-intercept is at $(12, 0)$. That matches choice D — D is correct.
